title: Change Requests
content_html:
Change Requests

This section stores proposed and in-progress changes that need to stay visible before, during, or after implementation.

Use it for:

  • product and workflow requests
  • implementation planning requests
  • UI request specs and task breakdowns
  • request docs that should remain easy to find without being merged into stable reference docs yet

Do not use it for:

  • stable runtime documentation
  • stable design-system rules
  • script reference docs
  • changelog entries for already-completed work

Those still belong in the owning reference docs and change logs.

Request Groups

  • UI Requests UI-driven feature requests, working specs, and task breakdowns.

Current Requests

  • Analysis Docs Viewer Request
  • Docs Build Incremental Request
  • Work And Series Prose Source Model Request
  • Moments Prose Source Model Request
  • Catalogue Lookup Invalidation Request
  • Catalogue Moment Editor Request
  • Catalogue Publication Workflow Request
  • Catalogue Delete Cleanup Request
  • Work-Owned Files And Links Request
  • Field-Aware Catalogue Build Scoping Request
  • Catalogue Work Unified Editor Request
  • Catalogue Work Detail Unified Editor Request
